hrafn.name: Hrafn
hrafn.description: Hrafn is SagaOS's terminal-first operational awareness engine for local calendar state, tasks, and deterministic signals.

quote.text: Often is counsel needed, and not force alone.

njal.name: Njal
njal.description: Njal is SagaOS's shell environment module for Zsh-based terminal workflow and user configuration.

quote.text: With law shall our land be built up, but with lawlessness laid waste.
